parameters.jsonBody: {"model":"{{ $env.SARVAM_MODEL || 'sarvam-m4' }}","messages":[{"role":"system","content":"You are a customer inquiry classifier. Return ONLY raw JSON with keys type, priority, confidence. type must be one of sales_inquiry, support_ticket, complaint, general_question, order_request. priority must be low, medium, or high. confidence must be a number from 0 to 1."},{"role":"user","content":"Subject: {{ $('Normalize_Input').item.json.subject }}\nBody: {{ $('Normalize_Input').item.json.original_inquiry }}"}],"max_tokens":200}

{"model":"{{ $env.SARVAM_MODEL || 'sarvam-m4' }}","messages":[{"role":"system","content":"You are a knowledge base researcher. Return ONLY JSON: {\"relevant_info\":\"...\",\"source\":\"internal_kb\"}. If no specific information is available, use relevant_info No specific information found. and source none."},{"role":"user","content":"Inquiry: {{ $('Classifier_JSON').item.json.original_inquiry }}\nClassification: {{ JSON.stringify($('Classifier_JSON').item.json.classification) }}"}],"max_tokens":250}

{"model":"{{ $env.SARVAM_MODEL || 'sarvam-m4' }}","messages":[{"role":"system","content":"You are a lead/request qualifier. Score the lead or request from 1-10. Return ONLY JSON: {\"lead_score\":0,\"reason\":\"one sentence explaining the score\"}."},{"role":"user","content":"Inquiry: {{ $('Researcher_JSON').item.json.original_inquiry }}\nClassification: {{ JSON.stringify($('Researcher_JSON').item.json.classification) }}\nResearch: {{ JSON.stringify($('Researcher_JSON').item.json.research) }}"}],"max_tokens":200}

{"model":"{{ $env.SARVAM_MODEL || 'sarvam-m4' }}","messages":[{"role":"system","content":"You are an execution coordinator. Confirm the reply is ready to send. Return ONLY JSON: {\"sent\":true,\"channel\":\"gmail\",\"logged\":true}."},{"role":"user","content":"Draft reply: {{ $('Responder_JSON').item.json.draft_reply }}\nChannel: gmail"}],"max_tokens":120}

parameters.jsCode:
const failed = $input.first().json;
throw new Error(`Agent validation failed at ${failed._agent}: ${failed._raw || 'missing required keys'}`);
